abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Stampede
abilities.text: After this model ends a Charge action in base contact with any other models, it may deal 1 damage to itself. If it does so, deal 1 damage to all other models in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Mechanical Headbutt
actions.effects: This action deals +2 damage for each raise instead of +1.

triggers.name: Industrial Waste
triggers.text: Discard the top two cards from your fate deck.

actions.name: Come With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models. Once per activation.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5", then place this model in base contact with it.

triggers.name: "Do You Even Have a Ticket?!"
triggers.text: Remove a Shame token from the target. Deal 3 damage to the target and move it up to 5".

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.

actions.name: Sweep Up the Trash
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target an enemy Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Summon a Drudge into base contact with the target and then remove the target.
